ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "name" TEXT /* File name of the image */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the image in pixels */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the image in pixels */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Color channel used (e.g., r, g, b) */,
  "ansioLevel" INTEGER /* Ansi level of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image format (foreign key referencing image_formats) */,
  "size_in_bytes" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  "image_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assigned category (foreign key referencing image_categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES image_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_image_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_category_id") REFERENCES image_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assigned role (foreign key referencing roles) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the image for search purposes */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date the image was taken */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the image was taken */,
  "capture_device" TEXT /* Device used to capture the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_metadata_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change history entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated image */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., resize, filter, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_histories_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_processing_jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing job */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being processed */,
  "processing_type" TEXT /* Type of processing applied (e.g., resize, filter) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the job (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the processing job */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the processing job */,
  "output_image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the output image (foreign key referencing images) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_processing_jobs_output_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("output_image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_processing_jobs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the role (e.g., upload, edit, view) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the image format (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Nature, Portraits) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_category_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated image */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assigned category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_category_mappings_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES image_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_category_mappings_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the image (1 to 5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment on the image */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_reviews_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., update, delete, create) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
